components.verification.learnMore: Learn more about verification on Bluesky
Accounts with a scalloped blue check mark {#t0/} can verify others. These trusted verifiers are selected by Bluesky.
An illustration showing that Bluesky selects trusted verifiers, and trusted verifiers in turn verify individual user accounts.
components.verification.verifications.so: Some of your verifications are invalid.
components.verification.verified.descrip: This account has a checkmark because it's been verified by trusted sources.
components.verification.verified.notVeri: This account has one or more attempted verifications, but it is not currently verified.
